evidence_phrases: The Firm delivered strong results in the first quarter, reporting net income of $16.5 billion.
Performance was strong across our businesses.
Markets revenue reached a record $11.6 billion
We continued to acquire new customers at a robust rate across the franchise
The U.S. economy remained resilient in the quarter

ambiguous_items.explanation: Document reports both 'reported' ($49.836B) and 'managed' ($50.536B) revenue. Per R2, using managed (non-GAAP) as primary for revenue where both disclosed, though schema uses revenue_usd_b without GAAP/non-GAAP distinction. Selected managed basis as it is management's primary reporting metric per page 6 note 2a.
Document states 'up 10%' for managed revenue YoY. Table shows 8% for managed QoQ, 10% for managed YoY. Using 10% as YoY growth.
Document table shows 8% O/(U) % for managed revenue versus 4Q25. This is QoQ growth rate.

Amount of $588 million is from prior year (1Q25) and is described as 'absence' in current period. This is a comparative one-time item - the gain was realized in prior year and is absent in current year. Amount represents magnitude of prior period non-recurring item for context.
FDIC special assessment accrual release amount not explicitly stated in document. Only described as 'absence' in current year. Cannot determine exact amount from text provided.
Corporate segment shows (47)% decline in revenue YoY. This is explicitly stated in table as O/(U) %.
